classes.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBCluster

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBCluster.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBCluster.attr_connection_string
documentation: Attribute ConnectionString: The public endpoint that is used to connect to the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBCluster.attr_db_cluster_id
documentation: Attribute DBClusterId: The ID of the AnalyticDB for MySQL Data Lakehouse Edition (V3.0) cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBCluster.attr_order_id
documentation: Attribute OrderId: The order ID.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ADBLake::DBCluster`, which is used to create an AnalyticDB for MySQL Data Lakehouse Edition (V3.0) cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDBCluster\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-adblake-dbcluster>

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `DBCluster`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-adblake-dbcluster>

```
param compute_resource

Property computeResource: The amount of reserved computing resources. Unit: ACUs. Valid values: 0ACU to 4096ACU. The value must be in increments of 16 ACUs. Each ACU is equivalent to 1 core and 4 GB memory. Note This parameter must be specified with a unit.

param db_cluster_version

Property dbClusterVersion: The version of the cluster. Set the value to 5.0.

param pay_type

Property payType: The billing method of the cluster. Valid values: Postpaid: pay-as-you-go. Prepaid: subscription.

param storage_resource

Property storageResource: The amount of reserved storage resources. Unit: AnalyticDB compute units (ACUs). Valid values: 0ACU to 2064ACU. The value must be in increments of 24 ACUs. Each ACU is equivalent to 1 core and 4 GB memory. Note This parameter must be specified with a unit.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: The virtual private cloud (VPC) ID of the cluster.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: The vSwitch ID of the cluster.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: The zone ID. Note You can call the DescribeRegions operation to query the most recent zone list.

param backup_set_id

Property backupSetId: The ID of the backup set that you want to use to restore data. Note You can call the DescribeBackups operation to query the backup sets of the cluster.

param db_cluster_description

Property dbClusterDescription: The description of the cluster. The description cannot start with http:// or https://. The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length

param enable_default_resource_pool

Property enableDefaultResourcePool: Specifies whether to allocate all reserved computing resources to the user_default resource group. Valid values: true (default) false

param period

Property period: The subscription duration of the subscription cluster. Valid values when Period is set to Year: 1 to 3 (integer). Valid values when Period is set to Month: 1 to 9 (integer). Note This parameter must be specified when PayType is set to Prepaid.

param period_type

Property periodType: The subscription type of the subscription cluster. Valid values: Year: subscription on a yearly basis. Month: subscription on a monthly basis. Note This parameter must be specified when PayType is set to Prepaid.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The resource group ID.

param restore_to_time

Property restoreToTime: The point in time to which you want to restore data from the backup set.

param restore_type

Property restoreType: The method that you want to use to restore data. Valid values: backup: restores data from a backup set. You must also specify the BackupSetId and SourceDBClusterId parameters. timepoint: restores data to a point in time. You must also specify the RestoreToTime and SourceDBClusterId parameters.

param source_db_cluster_id

Property sourceDbClusterId: The ID of the source AnalyticDB for MySQL Data Warehouse Edition cluster. If you want to restore a Data Lakehouse Edition cluster from a Data Warehouse Edition cluster, you must specify this parameter.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to cluster. Max support 20 tags to add during create cluster. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.compute_resource
documentation:
Property computeResource: The amount of reserved computing resources.

Unit: ACUs. Valid values: 0ACU to 4096ACU. The value must be in increments of 16 ACUs. Each ACU is equivalent to 1 core and 4 GB memory.
Note This parameter must be specified with a unit.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.db_cluster_version
documentation:
Property dbClusterVersion: The version of the cluster.

Set the value to 5.0.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.pay_type
documentation:
Property payType: The billing method of the cluster.

Valid values:
Postpaid: pay-as-you-go.
Prepaid: subscription.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.storage_resource
documentation:
Property storageResource: The amount of reserved storage resources.

Unit: AnalyticDB compute units (ACUs). Valid values: 0ACU to 2064ACU. The value must be in increments of 24 ACUs. Each ACU is equivalent to 1 core and 4 GB memory.
Note This parameter must be specified with a unit.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.vpc_id
documentation: Property vpcId: The virtual private cloud (VPC) ID of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.v_switch_id
documentation: Property vSwitchId: The vSwitch ID of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.zone_id
documentation:
Property zoneId: The zone ID.

Note You can call the  DescribeRegions  operation to query the most recent zone list.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.backup_set_id
documentation:
Property backupSetId: The ID of the backup set that you want to use to restore data.

Note You can call the  DescribeBackups  operation to query the backup sets of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.db_cluster_description
documentation:
Property dbClusterDescription: The description of the cluster.

The description cannot start with http:// or https://.
The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.enable_default_resource_pool
documentation:
Property enableDefaultResourcePool: Specifies whether to allocate all reserved computing resources to the user_default resource group.

Valid values:
true (default)
false

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.period
documentation:
Property period: The subscription duration of the subscription cluster.

Valid values when Period is set to Year: 1 to 3 (integer).
Valid values when Period is set to Month: 1 to 9 (integer).
Note This parameter must be specified when PayType is set to Prepaid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.period_type
documentation:
Property periodType: The subscription type of the subscription cluster.

Valid values:
Year: subscription on a yearly basis.
Month: subscription on a monthly basis.
Note This parameter must be specified when PayType is set to Prepaid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.resource_group_id
documentation: Property resourceGroupId: The resource group ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.restore_to_time
documentation: Property restoreToTime: The point in time to which you want to restore data from the backup set.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.restore_type
documentation:
Property restoreType: The method that you want to use to restore data.

Valid values:
backup: restores data from a backup set. You must also specify the BackupSetId and SourceDBClusterId parameters.
timepoint: restores data to a point in time. You must also specify the RestoreToTime and SourceDBClusterId parameters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.source_db_cluster_id
documentation:
Property sourceDbClusterId: The ID of the source AnalyticDB for MySQL Data Warehouse Edition cluster.

If you want to restore a Data Lakehouse Edition cluster from a Data Warehouse Edition cluster, you must specify this parameter.

methods.name: ros_cdk_adblake.DBClusterProps.tags
documentation:
Property tags: Tags to attach to cluster.

Max support 20 tags to add during create cluster. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

documentation: :Property: value: undefined

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ADBLake::DBCluster`, which is used to create an AnalyticDB for MySQL Data Lakehouse Edition (V3.0) cluster.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DBCluster` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-adblake-dbcluster>
